metadata.title: Yūtopias Systems — Decisions with measurable impact
metadata.description: Simulate how your choices affect cost, energy, and sustainability before you commit. AB360 connects all building data in a single model.

nav.announcementText: Zero Bootcamp registrations open. Coming in July · Barcelona.

hero.headline: How do you decide the cost, energy, and impact of a building over the next 50 years?
hero.subhead: Those three variables have always been connected. The problem is that no one measures them together before making decisions.
hero.hint: 10 minutes. You leave knowing where you stand.

introStrip.leftLine2: Each actor with their own data.
introStrip.rightLine1: A good decision is no longer a hunch.
introStrip.rightLine2: It is the simulation of its real impact.

simulab.headline: SimuLab projects the impact of your decisions before you execute them.
simulab.feature1Body: Bring cost and environmental footprints together to understand the real impact of every decision.
simulab.feature2Body: Assess decisions against regulatory criteria, the EU taxonomy, and sustainability objectives.
simulab.feature3Body: Use scientifically validated models to simulate each building typology with precision.
simulab.ctaHint: See the impact before acting. That is all.
simulab.closing1: SimuLab is only as good as the data you are willing to put on the table.
simulab.closing2: The tool does not do the work for you — it makes it possible to do it better
simulab.imageAlt: SimuLab in AB360: laptop showing a simulation cost comparison dashboard.

openlab.quote: <openlab>OpenLab</openlab> is senior expert consulting + a proprietary vertical platform. 6 months adapting it with you, 6 months using it yourself.
openlab.description: OpenLab is senior expert consulting + a proprietary vertical platform. 6 months adapting it with you, 6 months using it yourself.

col1.title: You work with real data from your projects
col1.body: The information already exists inside your company. In OpenLab we connect it with sector reference databases. Every simulation feeds the system. The outcome improves with each project.

col2.title: You configure Simulab to your operations
col2.body: With OpenLab the simulator becomes your operational AI agent. A real technology leap, calibrated to your building typology and aligned with your business drivers.

col3.title: You calculate impact on cost and sustainability
col3.body: Simulab calculates cost and carbon, energy, and water footprints for each construction solution, from chapter to line item. Generate scenarios and compare. You decide.

col4.title: SmartCheck: your goals aligned with the project
col4.body: Project objectives set the north star. SmartCheck validates that yours and your business drivers are aligned with them. And when you want, the same for every stakeholder.

openlab.footerTagline: The first movers do not follow the standard. They build it.

contactForm.headline: Join OpenLAB to adopt and adapt AB360
contactForm.description: OpenLAB drives the digitalisation of the building lifecycle and sustainable infrastructure. If you share this vision, tell us which city you'd like to participate or collaborate from.
contactForm.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Briefly tell us your idea or need...

contactForm.checkNewsletter: I want to receive information about AB360 and its updates
contactForm.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
contactForm.errorPrivacy: You must accept the privacy policy.
contactForm.successBody: Thank you for your interest in OpenLAB. Our team will review your request and contact you soon.

simulationChoiceBanner.regionAria: Message on project decisions and simulation
simulationChoiceBanner.left: If you still make project decisions without simulation, it is no longer for lack of tools.

partnersBootcampCta.headline: We are looking for partners who want to define how decisions will be made in this sector.

partners.intro: We've come this far together with:

ab360.label: The platform
ab360.headlineLine2: Behind it, something else is growing: AB360.
ab360.body: We are building a platform that connects building data to support better decisions across the full lifecycle, with the help of three AI agents.

agent1.title: SimuLab
agent1.body: Simulate how your decisions affect cost and sustainability before you execute them.

agent2.title: Cycle Planner
agent2.body: Turns those decisions into planning to optimise time, cost and scope.

agent3.title: Platón
agent3.body: Supports decision-making by connecting data, regulation, and project knowledge.

card1.name: Marc Nicolau
card1.quote: Our studies typically take about 15 days on average. With SimuLAB we see clear potential to evaluate design alternatives, costs, and sustainability in just one day.

card2.name: Teresa Batlle
card2.highlight: Cuts the project's environmental impact by an average of 60%.
card2.quote: Simulab from AB360 gave us a predictive and prescriptive assistant to guide architectural design, reducing environmental footprints while meeting the most demanding regulations.

card3.name: Howard Pierce
card3.highlight: Reduces project deviations by up to 30%.
card3.quote: With Simulab from AB360 we structured complex decisions into clear objectives, aligning teams and tasks for faster execution with fewer deviations.

yutopiasAbout.subline: We work to create systems that help <accent>build</accent> a better future.
yutopiasAbout.philosophy:
The name Yutopias comes from utopia 
not as an unreachable ideal,
but from good design.
From Lean as a philosophy.
From systems thinking applied
to a sustainable modernity.

closingStandardCta.titleLine1: The standard for how decisions are made in construction
closingStandardCta.hint: The sector standard is being written. Now.

metadata.title: The challenge — Decision-making in construction
metadata.description: Cost, energy, and impact have always been connected in a building. The problem is nobody measured them together. AB360 changes that with simulation and connected data.

challengePage.headline:
Building is a complex system.
Thousands of decisions.
Decades of consequences.
Yet it is approached without a holistic view.
challengePage.body: The vision exists. The data does not. Or it arrives late. Or it is fragmented or non-existent - within each organization and across all of them. And when it does arrive, the most important decisions have already been made - consciously or not.
challengePage.hint: 10 minutes. You know where you stand and where to improve.

nextSection.titleLine1: This is how it works today.

card1.title:
There is fragmentation
and validation comes late
card1.body: Data exists. Or it sits in a drawer. Or each team has its own. Nobody works with the same information at the same time. That, multiplied across all stakeholders, defines how decisions are made.

card2.title:
There is no connection
and validation comes late
card2.body: Cost is calculated. Footprints, sometimes. But when they arrive, the decision is often already made - or they are used to justify it. Those who integrate them from the start gain a real advantage.

card3.title:
There is no anticipation
and validation comes late
card3.body: You decide with the information you have. You cannot simulate before execution. When the real impact finally appears, changing course is expensive. Validation arrives to justify - not to improve.

card1.quote: "The real estate and construction sector generates around 38% of global CO2 emissions."
card1.source: United Nations Environment Programme - Global Status Report for Buildings and Construction 2024-2025

card2.quote: "Globally, 4 out of 10 projects fail to meet budget, schedule, or scope: millions lost in overruns and delays."
card2.source: Project Management Institute (PMI) - Report: A High Cost of Low Performance

card3.quote: "Up to 30% of work in construction is rework or waste."
card3.source: World Economic Forum - Shaping the Future of Construction: A Breakthrough in Mindset and Technology

nextSection.closingLine1:
It is not a talent problem.
It is a technology problem.
nextSection.closingLine2: And there is already a solution.

todaySection.headline:
For years, intuition and experience were enough.
Today they are not.
todaySection.paragraph1: Regulation no longer allows estimation. Margins no longer allow ignoring it. And decisions now carry economic consequences that did not exist before.
todaySection.paragraph2: The path is already mapped. Lean, shared data, evidence-based decisions. What is missing is the technology to make it operational.

taxonomy.title: European Taxonomy
taxonomy.body: The EU requires reducing CO2, energy, and water footprints in buildings, a sector worth ~€3T and ~18% of its GDP.

discoverAb360.headline: AB360 is the platform that connects building data across its entire lifecycle.
discoverAb360.highlight: Its first operational agent is Simulab - already available.
discoverAb360.paragraph1: At the center of AB360 there is a semantic digital twin. It is not a representation of the building - it is understanding. It integrates object data and lifecycle management processes. It relates meaning from development to operation.
discoverAb360.paragraph2: Three AI agents operate on top of that core. Each one in its own domain. All of them so you can make better decisions.
discoverAb360.sectionCtaHint: See the impact before acting. That is all.

agent1.title: SimuLab
agent1.body: Simulate how your decisions affect cost and sustainability before execution.

agent2.title: Cycle Planner
agent2.body: Plan tasks, deadlines, costs and footprints. Connect with your OKRs. Anticipate deviations.

agent3.title: Platón
agent3.body: Supports decision-making by connecting data, regulation, and project knowledge.

finalCtaSection.line1: We are looking for partners who want to define how
finalCtaSection.line2: decisions will be made in this sector.
finalCtaSection.tagline1: You join now, we shape it together.

metadata.title: Privacy policy
metadata.description: Personal data protection and user rights for AB360.

privacyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPage.lead: Personal data protection and user rights.
privacyPage.intro: This document adapts AB360 website content based on the policy published by YUTOPIAS SYSTEMS S.L.

sections.title: Purpose
paragraphs: This website is designed to present YUTOPIAS SYSTEMS S.L. services and receive information requests, commercial contacts, and applications.
Contact forms are used exclusively for the purpose indicated in each case, including newsletter subscription where applicable.

sections.title: Data controller
paragraphs: YUTOPIAS SYSTEMS S.L. (B44747095), Carrer de l'Església, no. 4 local 2D, 08024 Barcelona, Spain.
Contact email: enl@yutopias.com.

sections.title: Legal basis and data subject rights
paragraphs: Personal data is processed to manage information requests, communications, and requested services under consent, contractual relationship, or legal obligation.
Users may exercise access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, portability, and consent withdrawal rights.
bullets: Requests can be submitted in writing to the registered address or contact email.
A valid identification document may be required to verify identity.

cookieBanner.message: We use necessary cookies to keep the site running. With your permission, we will also use analytics cookies to improve your experience.
cookieBanner.necessaryDesc: Enable navigation and essential site features. Cannot be disabled.
cookieBanner.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how the site is used so we can improve it. Disabled until you accept them.

metadata.title: Cookie policy — AB360
metadata.description: Information about the use of cookies on the AB360 website by YUTOPIAS SYSTEMS S.L.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie policy
cookiesPage.lead: Information about the cookies used on this website, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Law 34/2002 (LSSI).

sections.title: What are cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files that websites store in the user's browser. They allow the site to remember information between visits or during a single session.
Not all cookies require consent: those strictly necessary for the site to function are exempt under European regulations.

sections.title: Cookies used on this site
paragraphs: This site uses only cookies of the following categories:

sections.title: Necessary cookies
paragraphs: Essential for basic site functionality. They include session cookies, language preference, and form security.
They cannot be disabled. They do not store personally identifiable information.
bullets: Duration: session or up to 12 months depending on type.

sections.title: Analytics cookies
paragraphs: Allow measuring site usage (pages visited, time on site, traffic source) to improve the experience and content.
They are only activated if the user gives consent. These cookies are currently disabled until the analytics service is enabled.
bullets: Purpose: aggregate analysis of site usage.

sections.title: Consent management
paragraphs: When you first visit the site, a notice will appear to accept, reject, or manage non-necessary cookies.
You can modify your preferences at any time via the 'Manage cookies' link in the footer.
You can also configure your browser to block or delete cookies, although this may affect site functionality.

sections.title: International transfers
paragraphs: The intended analytics provider (Google LLC) may transfer data to servers located outside the European Economic Area. These transfers are covered by standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission.
No transfers are activated until the user accepts analytics cookies.

sections.title: Further information
paragraphs: For any questions about the use of cookies, you can contact us at jjm@yutopias.com.
For more information about the processing of personal data, see our Privacy policy.

metadata.title: About us — Yūtopias Systems
metadata.description: We are Yūtopias Systems, the team behind AB360. Our mission is to transform how decisions are made in construction using simulation and connected data.

hero.title: Building better futures from
hero.body: We are professionals from the sector who decided the problem was too large to ignore.

intro.col1Body: A Barcelona-based company that researches, designs, and develops systems so that construction and infrastructure can be sustainable — to build a liveable planet within 50 years. Utopia is not naïve or a destination. It is the engineering of everyday life based on empirical systems.
intro.col2Body: We co-design European-origin artificial intelligence: specialised agents for the construction industry, built on a digital twin of processes across every stage of the asset lifecycle.
intro.col3Body: We seek partners, not clients. Rigour is only built with real data — yours, always yours — and with scientific methodology validated by La Salle R&D and ITeC. Those who come first define the standard.

vision.title: Where we come from and where we are going.
vision.para1: Construction is responsible for 40% of global CO₂ emissions. Not because the sector does not want to improve — but because no one has put the right tools on the table at the right time.
vision.para2: Yutopias was born from the conviction that sustainability and profitability are not opposing goals — they are the same goal, poorly measured. Our mission is to build the systems that connect them before decisions become irreversible.

principle1.title: Evidence before intuition.
principle1.body: The sector makes decisions with too little data. We provide what is missing. Auditable calculations. Scientifically validated archetypes.

principle2.title: Open innovation as the only path
principle2.body: In a sector where the product lives 50 years and depends on too many actors for any one to decide alone, innovating in a closed lab does not scale. The standard emerges from the ecosystem, not the company.

principle3.title: The long term as compass
principle3.body: The building designed today decides how much it will cost to operate over the next 50 years. We think at the asset scale, not the quarterly one.

founders.title: The people who decided this was worth it.

founder1.name: Juanjo Moreno
founder1.quote: I care about how we will inhabit the world in the coming decades. Not as a philosophical question — as a design problem that has a solution
founder1.bio: Multi-actor open innovation mediator trained at IESE Entrepreneurship and Innovation Center and the UNESCO Chair for Conflict Management at UAB. Three decades in construction. Yutopias is where those two disciplines meet: sector knowledge and mediation between actors who need to connect.

founder2.name: Eduardo Núñez
founder2.quote: Sustainability is not just environmental impact. It is also profitability and positive social impact. We needed a tool that measured all three dimensions at once.
founder2.bio: Building engineer trained in the Netherlands. Nearly forty years designing how large real estate assets operate — CEPSA, EDS, hospitals, airport infrastructure. A reference author in strategic Facility Management. Yutopias integrates his discipline into the product: the building designed today is the building operated over the next 50 years.

founder3.name: Iván Pérez
founder3.quote: The challenge is not having a vision — it is turning it into something that works with real data, on real projects, with real people.
founder3.bio: Architect and urbanist trained between ETSAB Barcelona and Delft TU. Co-founder and director for 18 years at Territori24, with works recognised by FAD and the European Biennial of Landscape. Co-responsible for the first LEED Platinum-certified social facility in Spain. At Yutopias he brings the designer's perspective — the person who makes the decisions the system needs to anticipate.

teamIntro.left: A team is not an org chart — it is a tribe around a totem. The totem here is clear: the partner who will inhabit the system for the next 50 years.
teamIntro.right: Each person brings mastery — mediation, engineering, design, technology architecture, finance — and works with autonomy in their own domain.
teamIntro.rightAccent: Open innovation is what makes the team and the ecosystem speak to each other, and that is where the magic comes from.

team.title: The people who make it possible

member1.name: Eugenia Rossetti
member1.bio: Designs how AB360's systemic vision lands in technology and how each partner inhabits it day to day.

member2.name: Alejandro Glejberman
member2.bio: Guardian of the stack. Defines AB360's technology architecture and leads the team that builds it.

member3.name: Tere Trepat
member3.bio: Designs how AB360's systemic vision lands in technology and how each partner inhabits it day to day.

member4.name: Aida Freixanet
member4.bio: Makes dense and complex things easy. Designs AB360's experience and interfaces from direct work with founders and early adopters.

member5.name: Laura Iglesias
member5.bio: Organises sprints and leads development by integrating all parts so product, design, and engineering move at the same pace.

member6.name: Andrés Montañez
member6.bio: Designs the architecture that connects agents with the semantic digital twin. Works shoulder to shoulder with the Tech Lead.

member7.name: Miguel Ángel Zamora
member7.bio: Develops AB360 with the Tech Lead. Turns the stack into a product that works.

member8.name: Pedro González-Anta
member8.bio: Leads Yutopias's financial, tax, and accounting structure. His work assures founders and investors that muscle and cash flow are at the level each milestone demands.

member9.name: Mari Carmen Sánchez
member9.bio: Handles accounting and taxes. The invisible work that keeps financial decisions grounded in accurate data.

ecosystem.title: The open and continuous innovation ecosystem

partnersBanner.headline: We are looking for partners who want to define how decisions will be made in this sector.
partnersBanner.tagline1: You join now, we shape it together.

metadata.title: The solution — AB360, building data platform
metadata.description: AB360 connects cost, energy, and environmental impact in a single model. Simulate decisions before committing and measure real impact at every stage of the building lifecycle.

hero.headline: The first AI agent for better decision-making in construction.
hero.body:
Simulab is not standalone software. It is the first operational agent of AB360 — the platform that integrates BIM, ERP, GMAO, and PMS into a semantic digital twin. Enter your project data. The engine simultaneously calculates the impact on costs and footprints — carbon, water, and energy.
See the result before you act.
hero.hint: 10 minutes. You know where you stand and where to improve.

quoteBanner.line1: Every decision without simulation already has a cost.
quoteBanner.line2: You just don't see it yet.

simulab.intro1: You've been making good decisions for years. Imagine making them with all the data on the table.
simulab.intro2: Simulab doesn't show past data. It projects the impact of decisions before they become irreversible. Enter your project data. The engine simultaneously calculates the impact on costs and footprints — carbon, water, and energy.
simulab.intro3: See the result before you act.
simulab.feature1Body: Every construction solution has a cost and footprint index — carbon, energy, and water — that translate into execution costs and project environmental indicators. Change a variable and Simulab recalculates the entire scenario in real time, before the decision becomes irreversible.
simulab.feature2Body: Simulab's indices and indicators are calibrated to the European taxonomy and environmental certifications. Every project decision is rigorous, auditable, and aligned with a sustainable approach from the first calculation.
simulab.feature3Body: Simulab doesn't treat each project as a new prototype. It recognizes archetypes — scientifically validated construction patterns — and makes them dynamic. Adjust variables, change solutions, and the system recalculates the impact on cost and environmental footprints without losing model rigor.
simulab.feature4Body: Each partner has their typology, operations, and objectives. Simulab starts from the archetype closest to their reality and adapts it in three steps: first we understand how you work, then we configure the model, and finally we co-create it with you until it's yours. We call the personalized milestone panel SmartCheck.

openlab.headline: OpenLab to first adapt, then adopt SimuLab.
openlab.body: OpenLab is the 12-month program where Simulab adapts to each partner's real operations through archetypes. Yutopias, La Salle R&D, and ACCIÓ have decided that the best way to deploy Simulab is by co-creating it with the first partners. We don't sell finished software — we build the standard together.
openlab.bootcampLead: Zero Bootcamp is the entry point.

platform.headline1: Simulab is the first. Not the only one.
platform.body: Simulab is not standalone software. It is the first operational agent of AB360.
platform.twinIntro: A semantic representation of the building and all its lifecycle processes.
platform.twinHighlight: It doesn't store data — it understands it.
platform.twinPara1: Buildings generate two types of data: object data — costs, materials, footprints, measurements — and process data — decisions aligned to objectives, strategic planning, regulatory compliance. Until now, they lived separately. AB360 combines them for the first time in a single brain.
platform.twinPara2: AB360 doesn't replace existing systems — it connects them. BIM knows how it's built. ERP knows what it costs. GMAO knows how it operates. PMS knows how it's managed. AB360 integrates all of this into a semantic digital twin that understands the complete building, from development to operation. The data Simulab generates today will feed CyclePlanner and Platón tomorrow. No migration, no friction.
platform.connectedIntro: The data was always there. Silos held it hostage.
platform.connectedBody: AB360 connects internal and project teams collaborating at any point in the building lifecycle — developers, designers, builders, industrials, and operations — and the software they use — BIM, ERP, GMAO, PMS. It doesn't replace any source. It integrates them into a single semantic brain — that doesn't just store data, but understands its meaning.

agent1.feature4: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur. Sodales varius semper vel fringilla.

agent2.title: Cycle Planner
agent2.shortDesc: Simulab simulates the impact of a decision. Cycle Planner plans strategy at any point in the building lifecycle.
agent2.description: Cycle Planner is the strategic planning agent for the complete asset lifecycle. It works on the same semantic digital twin as Simulab — with the same data, no migration, no friction.
agent2.descriptionLine2: The data Simulab generates today will feed Cycle Planner tomorrow.
agent2.feature1: Strategic planning for the complete asset lifecycle.
agent2.feature2: Just-in-Time assembly sequences adapted to each typology.
agent2.feature3: Coordination between developers, builders, and operations in a single flow.
agent2.feature4: Integrated with Simulab data from day one. No migration.

agent3.title: Platón
agent3.shortDesc: Everything AB360 knows about your project, your team, and your environment. Available in a conversation.
agent3.description: Platón is the platform's conversational agent. It has access to the semantic digital twin, Simulab and Cycle Planner data and conclusions, building regulations, and project documents. It's not a generic chatbot — it's your project's source of truth in natural language.
agent3.feature1: Project assistant — the project's source of truth in natural language.
agent3.feature2: Product assistant — onboarding, support, and continuous training from day one.
agent3.feature3: Integrated with Simulab and Cycle Planner. The same semantic brain, in natural language.

actors.headline: Each actor, their decisions.
actors.body: AB360 is not a system for the company. It's a system for each person who makes decisions within it.

actor1.title: Developer / Investor
actor1.description: Know the economic and environmental impact of each design decision before committing budget.
actor1.quote: "I approve budgets based on estimates. When real data arrives, there's no room to maneuver."

actor2.title: CEO / CIO / COO
actor2.description: Turn your team's accumulated knowledge into a reproducible and auditable system.
actor2.quote: "If the most knowledgeable technician leaves tomorrow, half the company's judgment goes with them."

actor3.title: Director of Studies
actor3.description: Simulate the real cost of each bid before presenting it. Reduce the gap between estimation and execution.
actor3.quote: "There's always a gap between what we bid and what we execute. And we never know exactly why."

actor4.title: Architect / Engineer
actor4.description: Calculate the impact of each technical decision on cost and footprint before passing it to the team.
actor4.quote: "Every late change drags the whole team down. And they always come late."

actor5.title: Construction Delegate / Project Manager
actor5.description: Detect deviations in real time and coordinate all agents on a single source of truth.
actor5.quote: "I make bids with almost no margin and wait for changes to recover it. That can't be the model."

actor6.title: Manager / Property / Facilities
actor6.description: Operate the asset with complete data from day one. Anticipate maintenance costs and decisions.
actor6.quote: "I find out about asset problems when they're already urgent. Never before."

diagnosticCta.body: Discover your organization's challenges and how AB360 can solve them.
diagnosticCta.hint: 10 minutes. You know where you stand and where to improve.

metadata.title: OpenLab — 12-month open innovation program
metadata.description: Join OpenLab and adapt SimuLab to your real operations. 12 months of open innovation for construction companies ready to make data-driven decisions.

hero.headline: OpenLab, a 12-month open innovation journey
hero.body: Yutopias, La Salle R&D and ACCIÓ have decided the best way to deploy SimuLab is to co-create it with the first partners. We don't sell finished software — we build the standard together.

ecosystem.headline: Be part of the Building Innovation ecosystem.
ecosystem.paragraph1: Building and infrastructure are among the key arenas where Europe and its member states will win or lose the game. More efficiency, more energy independence, more technology.
ecosystem.paragraph2: It is not an option — it is the direction of competitiveness.
ecosystem.paragraph3: Yutopias Systems is the gateway to a top-tier open innovation ecosystem — where Artificial Intelligence is applied to real and concrete challenges in profitability, productivity and sustainability in construction.
ecosystem.benefit1Body: You don't install generic software. You adapt the simulation engine to your building typology and real processes.
ecosystem.benefit2Body: Each archetype is validated by La Salle R&D. Your operations co-create the standard the sector needs.
ecosystem.benefit3Body: Every project decision is rigorous, auditable and aligned with regulatory criteria from the first calculation.
ecosystem.benefit4Body: Your business objectives aligned with the project's. A custom milestone dashboard that evolves with you.
ecosystem.benefit5Body: The Yutopias, La Salle R&D and ACCIÓ team accompanies you through every phase of the process.

journey.headline: The OpenLab journey
journey.introLead: Your company makes good decisions. The problem is that it makes them with only half of the information it should have.
journey.introBody: OpenLab develops a real use case aligned with your company OKRs. It is structured into six cards, each with a clear purpose and a concrete deliverable. The process culminates with SmartCheck.
journey.introFoot: If you want more information or have questions, write to us.
journey.t1Body: Where margin, time and quality are lost in your real processes. Always from reality — not from what we think is happening.
journey.t2Body: We prioritize challenges with the highest return and technical feasibility. Where a concrete improvement has the greatest impact on your business.
journey.t3Body: Simulab calculates impact. But someone must have the authority to act. Here we define who — and with what data.
journey.t4Body: The specific use case that Simulab will work on. Aligned with your business and project objectives. Not generic — yours.
journey.t5Body: We activate Simulab on your real use case. Costs, footprints, decisions. Results are verifiable from day one.
journey.t6Body: The panel that connects your project decisions with your business drivers. Calibrated, verifiable and yours.

quoteBanner.headlineLine1: Today you can co-create the system.
quoteBanner.sublead: A moment when partners do not just access the tool — they shape it.
quoteBanner.paragraph1: Simulab archetypes are calibrated to your project typology. Your processes are integrated into the simulator, and if you identify missing functionality, you can co-create it. What has value for the sector is democratized across the ecosystem.
quoteBanner.paragraph2: When the system matures, that margin of influence closes. Joining now means preferential conditions and a competitive position that will not be available later.

bootcamp.headline: Bootcamp Zero
bootcamp.body: The Zero Bootcamp is the entry point to OpenLab. Two intensive days to discover the system, understand your archetype and define your roadmap for the next 12 months.
bootcamp.paragraph1: The sector is in a moment of transformation with no way back. Companies that understand it early have an advantage that cannot be bought later.
bootcamp.paragraph2: Profitability, productivity, sustainability and European taxonomy — concrete building challenges addressed with AI, digital twins and agents.
bootcamp.paragraph3: Early adopters, investors, ACCIÓ, La Salle R&D, IESE, Barcelona Contech Hub, GBCE and BStartup in the same room. You see Simulab running, share your case and decide whether to join.
bootcamp.value1Title: There is a before and after.
bootcamp.value2Body: Selection is based on what you bring.
bootcamp.value3Title: This dialogue does not happen elsewhere.
bootcamp.value4Title: You leave with more than expected.
bootcamp.value5Title: Early movers always have an advantage.
bootcamp.value5Body: Preferential conditions that will not be available later.
bootcamp.ctaCardBody: Share your details and we will contact you shortly.
bootcamp.ctaCardCta: Request diagnosis and reserve your place
bootcamp.formSuccess: Thanks. Your request has been saved successfully.
bootcamp.formError: We could not save your request. Please try again.
bootcamp.entryCard1Body: You start with the self-assessment. Then, an initial session where you present your case and discover the system. The companies that will join OpenLab are selected.
bootcamp.entryCard2Body: Each partner assigns one or more participants. Without real participation, the process does not deliver results.
bootcamp.entryCard3Body: An Excel, an ERP, a BIM or a CMMS. Data from your real projects — not from a lab.
bootcamp.entryCard4Body: The panel that measures the success of each use case for your company, not just for the project. We build it with you.
bootcamp.entryCard5Body: In OpenLab you do not work alone. SQUADS are groups of companies that share the same data about the same project, each from its own use case.
bootcamp.entryCard6Body: 12 months of programme plus 12 months of Simulab running with no additional cost. In total, 24 months for the system to become fully yours.
bootcamp.entryCard7Body: Bootcamps #1 and #2 at the La Salle-URL Campus. The rest is remote via Google Meet. Each session has a concrete deliverable.
bootcamp.entryCard8Body: €10,000 + VAT. It can be activated as an intangible R&D+i asset over a two-year period — the invoice is tax-deductible and does not impact your profit and loss account.

partnersBanner.headline: We're looking for partners who want to define how decisions will be made in this sector.

logosStrip.topBanner: Registrations for Bootcamp Zero in Barcelona, July 2026 are now open
logosStrip.leftLine1: If what you need is training or consulting, there are better places for that.
logosStrip.rightLead: The first partners co-create the system.
logosStrip.rightBody: They have a voice in how it is built.

metadata.title: Strategic self-assessment
metadata.description: Strategic self-assessment to identify your top improvement priorities. 12 questions, instant results.

hero.heading: What information are you using to make decisions that will shape the next 50 years?
hero.body: The three variables that determine the future of a building — <highlight>cost, energy, impact</highlight> — have always been connected. This assessment gives you your challenge map in 10 minutes.

prelead.heading: Tell us who you are
prelead.infoBoxDiagnostic: We will send you a personalised PDF report with your results and priority challenges for your profile.
prelead.infoBoxBootcamp: We will contact you to let you know if your application has been accepted.
prelead.privacyText: I accept the processing of my data in accordance with the
prelead.privacySuffix: of yūtopias systems. No spam — just the report and an occasional follow-up.
prelead.errorRequired: Please fill in your name, company and e-mail to continue.
prelead.errorEmail: Please enter a valid e-mail address.
prelead.errorPrivacy: You must accept the privacy policy to continue.
prelead.errorServer: We could not save your data. Please try again.
prelead.diagnosticLeftHeading: Your organisation makes good decisions. It always has.
prelead.diagnosticLeftBody: The problem is that it makes them with half the information it should have. This assessment pinpoints exactly which half is missing and returns the three challenges that are costing you the most today — in cost, time, and expertise.
prelead.bootcampLeftBody: Bootcamp Zero is free. Places are limited to 60 participants and the selection process is real — we want every company in the room to have a specific construction challenge to address. That is why we start with the self-assessment: it lets us understand your situation before deciding whether you fit this edition.
prelead.bootcampStep1Body: Tell us who you are and what challenges you face.
prelead.bootcampStep2Body: The team evaluates each application individually. We look for diversity in building typologies and genuine decision-maker profiles.
prelead.bootcampStep3Body: If your application is accepted, you receive confirmation by email with all the details. If it does not fit this edition, we will let you know regardless.

profile.heading: Where do you make decisions from?
profile.subheading: Questions are calibrated to your real perspective within the organisation.

results.scoreNote: Your score: {score}/10. Each block carries a different weight depending on your profile — it is not a simple average.
results.conclusionHeading: What this means for your organisation
results.retosIntroText: The challenges costing you the most today in your profile — in margin, in time, and in traceability.
results.bridgeReflection: If these challenges are still the same in 12 months, how much will not starting today have cost you?
results.bridgeHeading: These challenges are not yours alone. They are being worked on right now.
results.bridgeBodyConnector: , a room with La Salle R&D, ACCIÓ and BStartup from Banc Sabadell will work on challenges like
results.bridgeBodySuffix: . This is not a webinar or a demo — it is where your team builds its first SmartCheck: challenge → objective → data → decision.
results.formHeading: Reserve your place at Bootcamp Zero
results.formSubheading: The Yūtopias Systems team will receive your application along with your assessment summary to prepare the session around the sector challenges that interest you most.
results.formFieldChallenge: Which challenge would you like to work on at the bootcamp? (optional)
results.formFieldChallengePlaceholder: Briefly describe the most urgent operational challenge for your organisation…
results.formDisclaimer: The Yūtopias Systems team will contact you to confirm your place.
results.formSuccessBody:
The Yūtopias Systems team will receive your application along with your assessment summary. They will confirm your place shortly.

See you in July 2026 in Barcelona.
results.bridgeAlertRequired: Please fill in at least your name, company and email to apply for a place.
results.bridgeAlertEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

hero.title: Join Bootcamp Zero
hero.body: Limited spots · Real selection. Reserve your place and complete the assessment — we review your profile and confirm whether you are a fit.

steps.title: Three steps to join
steps.body: The process is designed so you arrive at the bootcamp with your company diagnosis already done.
steps.step1Body: Share your details and we will hold your spot.
steps.step2Body: Complete your company self-assessment in 10 minutes.
steps.step3Body: We review your profile and contact you to confirm.
